title: lobelia polyphylla var. bracteosa
intro: Lobelia polyphylla var. bracteosa, also known as Bracted Lobelia, is a plant species that belongs to the Lobelia genus and is native to the mountainous regions of Hawaii. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with Lobelia polyphylla var. bracteosa include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as its potential use in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Lobelia polyphylla var. bracteosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other medicinal plants in traditional Hawaiian medicine.
